name: Mix'n'match Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 Cups Summer Squash, cubed (Yellow, Zucchini, Pattypan and/or sunburst)
1 Pound Bulk Pork Sausage, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place squash and a small amount of water in a large saucepan; cover and cook for 8-10 minutes or until tender. Drain.
2. Add all remaining ingredients to the cooked squash mixture; mix well.
3. Transfer the mixture to a greased 11-inch x 7-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 30-35 minutes.
Yield: 6-8 servings
